title: frontend: useKubeObjectList: Fix state overwrite during render
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: Second commit 'frontend: Add useKubeObjectList state update regression test' missing useKubeObjectList: SubArea.
Two separate setListsToWatch calls consolidated into a single functional updater — eliminates render-phase state overwrite.
Map-based O(1) deduplication replaces the previous O(n^2) findIndex pattern.
Regression test for simultaneous namespace add+remove directly verifies convergence to the expected watched set.
